Q:SCANDALS1. Over the last two years there have been various instances of public figures or politicians breaking Covid guidance or lockdown rules. Of the three below, which would you say you found the most shocking?
column13: The staff of No 10 Downing Street having a Christmas party in December 2020 at a time when such parties were banned in the rest of the country
column14: Dominic Cummings breaking lockdown rules in April 2020 to drive his family to Barnard Castle while he had Coronavirus
column15: Matt Hancock and his advisor / mistress Gina Coladangelo breaking social distancing rules in June 2021 by mixing together with people who weren’t part of their household
